keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal!  Bonaire 1, Anguilla 0. Ginel Ronde (Bonaire) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Jonathan Libania   following a fast break.
Vershawn Hodge (Anguilla) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Bonaire. Raemian Janga replaces Ginel Ronde.
Goal!  Bonaire 2, Anguilla 0. Marshelon Pourier (Bonaire) right footed shot from very close range to the high centre of the goal    following a corner.
First Half ends, Bonaire 2, Anguilla 0.
Second Half begins Bonaire 2, Anguilla 0.
Substitution, Anguilla. Armoni Gumbs replaces Jauron Gayle.
Substitution, Anguilla. Javis Jones replaces Sedu Bradshaw.
